content: DOMPurify.sanitize() is synchronous by default and returns a string; RETURN_TRUSTED_TYPE:true returns a TrustedHTML for Trusted Types CSP integration. No native async/Promise support — a DxKit consumer wrapping DOMPurify in the hook would call it synchronously and the hook's Promise<string> return type accommodates other async sanitizers (e.g. dynamically-imported or policy-fetching ones) without forcing DOMPurify users into unnecessary async ceremony.
